body.notes: Add covering index or materialized column for INSTR filter slow queries on wg_cooccur. See issue #328 for query patterns. Close #328.
body.title: T-wg-instr-index: Fix slow SELECT on wg_cooccur INSTR filter
body.result: Fixed two separate issues: (1) INSTR() doesn't exist in PostgreSQL — added _INSTR_RE regex to db_proxy.py _PGConnWrapper.execute() and executemany() to translate INSTR( → strpos( at query time (same semantics: 0=not found). (2) Full-table-scan for bigram filter — added idx_wgc_a_unigram and idx_wgc_b_unigram partial indexes WHERE strpos(word_a/b, '__')=0 to wg_cooccur; hot_nodes() now uses Index Only Scan. Partial index creation added to WordGraph.__init__() for PGDatabaseProxy path so new DB instances get them automatically.
